omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When you voluntarily disclose your personal information in your profile, on forums and comment online in forum /chat areas, it becomes publicly available and can be viewed by other users. Forums, chats, and other areas of the community of users of our applications, that are available through our websites and applications, are public. In such areas, you should not disclose any information that can be used to establish your identity or the identity of any other person. We are not responsible for the security and protection of information disclosed by you in such areas.
